content_fingerprint: llama cpp release b8936 lands avx2 cpu optimization for q6 k quantization a targeted performance patch for the widely used llama cpp inference library speeds up q6 k quantized model inference on avx2 capable cpus offering meaningful gains for local llm deployments without hardware upgrades the llama cpp project tagged release b8936 on 26 april 2026 introducing an avx2 optimization for the q6 k quantization path in its cpu backend pr 22345 q6 k is a high precision int6 quantization scheme popular among users running large models on consumer grade hardware the new kernel targets the ggml cpu pat
